title: Draft Guidance Document - List of Recognized Standards - Canada.ca
content:
## Draft Guidance Document - List of Recognized Standards

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

### Notice to the reader:
The online consultation is now closed.
Draft Date: 2016-04-20
- Changes to the List of Recognized Standards Standards Added Standards Updated Standards Removed
- List of Recognized Standards Anaesthetic and Respiratory Biocompatibility Cardiovascular Contraception Dental Electromedical General In Vitro Diagnostic Manufacturing Materials Ophthalmology Orthopaedics Radiology Sterilization
- Anaesthetic and Respiratory

## Changes to the List of Recognized Standards
